models.title: DE3175 LED Light Bulb - (4) SMD LED Festoon Bulb - 3022 Base - Single / 6-Pack
models.category: Festoon Base LED Bulbs > Miniature > Specialty > Cars, Trucks, and SUVs
source_fields:
Replace outdated incandescent lights with this DE3175 LED light bulb and enjoy bright, long-lasting illumination. A top choice for a wide range of vehicle applications, including vanity lights and dome lights. Thermal management extends life and reduces heat dissipation.
Product Details:
  • Check compatibility with our Vehicle LED Bulb Finder before purchase
  • Emits bright white light between 6000K and 3100K color temperatures
  • 10-30 VDC input
  • Lifetime exceeds 30000 hours
  • Three-year warranty

models.title: Enchant 24" LED Bathrooom Vanity Light, 5-CCT, 120V, Brushed Nickel Finish
source_fields:
Traditional Charm Meets Modern PerformanceTransform your bathroom into a sophisticated sanctuary with the RAB Lighting ENCHANT collection. This ENCT-24BN 24" LED vanity bar seamlessly blends timeless elegance with cutting-edge lighting technology, delivering both style and exceptional functionality for your vanity space.Imagine starting each day with perfectly balanced lighting that adapts to your needs—whether you're applying makeup with precision under bright, crisp illumination or unwinding in the evening with a warm, relaxing glow. The ENCHANT vanity light puts you in complete control of your bathroom ambiance.Key Features:

5 Adjustable Color Temperatures (2700K-5000K): Switch from warm, cozy lighting to bright, daylight tones with field-adjustable CCT settings

Fully Dimmable: Fine-tune brightness levels to create the perfect atmosphere for any task or mood

Premium Brushed Nickel Finish: Timeless aesthetic that complements both traditional and contemporary bathroom designs

Shatter-Resistant Lens: Durable construction ensures long-lasting performance and safety

Energy-Efficient LED Technology: 28W integrated LED provides brilliant illumination while reducing energy costs

Ideal 24" Size: Perfect for standard single vanities or smaller double vanity setups, providing even coverage across your mirror area
The ENCHANT collection represents the perfect marriage of vintage-inspired design and modern LED efficiency. Its classic cylindrical profile and refined brushed nickel finish evoke the sophisticated aesthetics of traditional vanity lighting, while the advanced LED technology delivers superior performance, longevity, and energy savings.Whether you're renovating a master bath or updating a guest powder room, the RAB ENCHANT vanity light provides the versatility, quality, and timeless style that elevates any space. The 24" length offers optimal coverage for most standard vanity configurations, ensuring flattering, shadow-free illumination for grooming and daily routines.

models.title: Spec 36" LED Bath Vanity, Black Finish
source_fields: The Maxim Lighting 52006BK Spec 36" LED Bath Vanity sets the standard for minimalistic contemporary lighting. Ideal for both residential and commercial applications, its advanced light engine features a high-quality dimmable driver with multi-volt input and high color rendering LEDs, ensuring ultimate vanity illumination. This sleek fixture in a Black Finish provides exceptional light quality and modern style for expansive vanity spaces.

models.title: Intention 12" 2 Lights Vanity Light, Black Finish
source_fields: The SATCO|NUVO 60-6972 Intention 12" 2-light vanity light is styled with form and function for a perfect industrial design. Its simple base is finished in black with warm brass accents on the sockets, decorative lug nuts, and the lower support arm. We recommend G25 shaped bulbs to enhance the look of this simple yet tasteful vanity light.

models.title: Nouveau Beacon 2 Light 14.00 inch Bathroom Vanity Light
Cylinder 29" 4-Light Bath Vanity, Satin Nickel Finish
source_fields: The Maxim Lighting 9054SWSN Cylinder 29" is a classic 4-light bath vanity. It features cylindrical satin white glass shades supported on stepped round cups, mounted to an oval-shaped frame finished in satin nickel. This fixture uses medium base bulbs (not included) to provide a soft, flattering light for larger vanity spaces.

Kichler Gunnison 33.75 in. 4-Light Bathroom Vanity Light, Black
source_fields:
Kichler Gunnison Bathroom Vanity Light — BlackThe Kichler Gunnison bathroom vanity light, model 45667BK, embodies a transitional style with its sleek black finish. Crafted from durable steel, this fixture measures 33.75 in. in width and 9.75 in. in height, featuring a 4-light design that requires E26 medium base bulbs (not included).Key Features

Overall Dimensions: Width of 33.75 in., height of 9.75 in., and an extension of 6.25 in. from the wall.

Maximum Wattage: Each socket supports up to 75 watts, providing ample illumination.

Finish: Finished in a classic black, suitable for various interior styles.

Material: Constructed from high-quality steel for durability.

Light Source: Accommodates four E26 medium base bulbs, offering flexibility in bulb choice.

Dimmable: Compatible with most dimming switches for customizable lighting.

Mounting: Designed for interior use with a damp location rating.

Canopy Dimensions: Features a canopy height of 5 in. and depth of 0.83 in.
Core Design & AestheticThis fixture's transitional design blends modern and traditional elements, making it a versatile choice for various decor styles. The black finish adds a touch of elegance, while the absence of a shade allows for maximum light output.Light Source & Bulb InformationThis vanity light requires four E26 medium base bulbs, each with a maximum wattage of 75W. Bulbs are not included, allowing you to choose the preferred brightness and color temperature.Dimensions & AdjustabilityThe fixture measures 33.75 in. in width and 9.75 in. in height, with a 6.25 in. extension from the wall. It is not adjustable but provides ample coverage for standard bathroom vanities.Installation & ElectricalDesigned for hardwired installation, this fixture operates at 120V and is compatible with dimming switches, offering flexibility in light intensity.Where This Fixture Works Best
